narration: Chaperone proteins help other proteins fold correctly.

ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Chaperone proteins help other proteins fold correctly.

narration: Without them, misfolded proteins can cause diseases like Alzheimer’s.
visual_description: Escalation visual: Without them, misfolded proteins can cause diseases like Alzheimer’s.
